name: data-vizard
description: A staged data visualization workshop for moving from dataset intake to analysis, narrative, design, and an HTML artifact.

interface.shortDescription: Guide data visualization projects from dataset to HTML story.
interface.longDescription: Data Vizard bundles five Codex skills for a complete data visualization workflow: orchestration, data curation, exploratory analysis, narrative framing, and HTML visualization design.
defaultPrompt: Use Data Vizard to build a visualization from this CSV.
Guide me from dataset intake to an HTML data story.
Help me choose the best story direction for this dataset.
